Capabilities

Built for Serious Work

From research to publishing, Aries orchestrates every stage of your content pipeline with precision.

🧠

LLM-Powered Intelligence

Multi-model reasoning chains for research, strategy, and content production.

📡

Multi-Platform Publishing

Unified dispatch to Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn, X, YouTube, Reddit, and TikTok.

🔄

n8n Workflow Engine

Production-grade orchestration with automatic repair, retry, and approval flows.

🛡️

Enterprise Security

Tenant isolation, RBAC, secure token storage, and session hardening.
